message:
🐛 Remove standalone modals — Console Studio is the single entry point (#9718)

Remove all standalone SidebarCustomizer, CreateDashboardModal triggers
from Sidebar, Dashboard, and FloatingDashboardActions. All customization
actions (add cards, create dashboards, manage sidebar) now route through
Console Studio via openAddCardModal(section).

- Sidebar: 'Add more' opens Console Studio at dashboards section
- Dashboard: GettingStartedBanner 'Explore Dashboards' opens Console Studio
- Dashboard: Remove standalone CreateDashboardModal render
- Dashboard: Remove standalone SidebarCustomizer render
- FloatingDashboardActions: Remove legacy Customize button and
  SidebarCustomizer render; remove ?customizeSidebar URL param handling
- 96 lines of dead modal code removed

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
